Tweet.text: Hello from Nango integration! Testing create tweet action - v2.
Hello from Nango! Testing the create tweet action.
Anyone else notice that the hardest part of any side project is naming things?
Hot take: the best debugging tool is still console.log. Fight me. #DevLife #JavaScript
